recommendations.title: Jane Eyre

recommendations.title: No Time to Die
recommendations.overview: Bond has left active service and is enjoying a tranquil life in Jamaica. His peace is short-lived when his old friend Felix Leiter from the CIA turns up asking for help. The mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous

recommendations.title: The Pianist
recommendations.overview: The true story of pianist Władysław Szpilman's experiences in Warsaw during the Nazi occupation. When the Jews of the city find themselves forced into a ghetto, Szpilman finds work playing in a café; and when his family is deported in 1942, he stays

recommendations.title: Inglourious Basterds
recommendations.overview: In Nazi-occupied France during World War II, a group of Jewish-American soldiers known as "The Basterds" are chosen specifically to spread fear throughout the Third Reich by scalping and brutally killing Nazis. The Basterds, lead by Lt. Aldo Raine so

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: The Mountain
recommendations.overview: The heroic story of two soldiers trapped in an ambush, fighting for their lives.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Where Eagles Dare

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.
